title: Agreeds Heros(Palladium addon)
body:
Welcome to the initial release of the Palladium Speedster Mod, bringing the iconic velocity of the Flash to your Minecraft world. This is just the beginning of a much larger superhero universe.

Our current focus is on delivering an authentic and balanced speedster experience. We are moveing to a beyond simple to a sophisticated new Dynamic Speed System, allowing for precise control over your velocity—it's no longer just "all or nothing."

Current Flash Abilities Include:

Enhanced Super-Speed: Traverse your world in a blur with our nuanced movement system.

Rapid Cellular Regeneration: A natural healing factor that mends wounds at an accelerated rate.

Atomic Vibration: Phase through solid matter by vibrating your atoms, effectively granting temporary invisibility and intangibility.

Hydrokinetic Momentum: Walk on water by controlling the kinetic energy beneath your feet.

The Road Ahead:
This mod is under active development by myself and Dangerboy. Our ambitious plan is to expand the Palladium Addon into a full-fledged DC Universe experience. After perfecting the speedsters, future updates will introduce:

The immense strength and flight of Kryptonians

The gadget-based prowess of Batman

The light-construct willpower of the Lantern Corps

Join our community and watch as we bring these heroes to life!

Our Discord server is coming soon! Stay tuned for the link to get involved, give feedback, and follow our progress.
